race.comment: DESERT ORA (6) finished off strongly to win by 0.5L at this track and trip when an odds-on favourite, securing her maiden win. Faithfull remains in the saddle and while this is tougher, she's shown good ability throughout the early stages of her career. Can go on with the job now. FOUR SEAS (7) won well two back before a 0.6L defeat at Narrogin last time out when still turning in a good figure. The wide draw is a query, but she has good early speed and can roll forward from out wide. Makes plenty of appeal today and can put her best foot forward again. REGGIO CALABRIA (1) finished 2.8L off the winner following a 1.1L defeat here the start prior. Stepping out in trip is the query, but his best form stacks up and if he can be at that level here, he's in a suitable race. MISTER RAFFLES (4) can sit much closer this time and can improve sharply. MISS ROMPIN (8) was too good last time out and can repeat the dose without surprising.
